creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
/usr/src/release/i386/RELNOTES.TXT omits the ESS Solo-1 sound card
from the list of supported devices.  It works quite well as of Friday,
Aug 18th cvsup.  It is a PCI device found on ASUS motherboards.

pcm0: <ESS Solo-1E> port 0x9400-0x9403,0x9800-0x9803,0xa000-0xa00f,0xa400-0xa40f,0xa800-0xa83f irq 5 at device 9.0 on pci0

Fix: 

Add to list of supported configurations.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
n/a
